title: オークスの後に・冠はなくとも

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove just misses out on winning the race,
but...

text_block_list.name: Male Fan
text_block_list.text:
You were great, Air Groove! Better luck next
time!

text_block_list.name: Female Fan
text_block_list.text:
You're still the new queen in our hearts, Air
Groove! You'll do better in the next one!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
(It's a frustrating result, but my fans accept my
performance anyway...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Air Groove is still so dignified!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if I could stand so proud after a
disappointment?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
(As ever, people are always watching. Perhaps
even more so after such a disappointing loss. I
have to remember that.)

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: (Which means I can't afford to be upset!)

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I apologize for failing to deliver a satisfactory
result.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
This isn't the fault of your training. This is due to
my own inadequacy. For that reason—
choice_data_list: Let's do even better in the Shuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Yes. That was always my intent.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You really are ever the optimist. I should take a
page out of your book.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Let's go. The final race of the Triple Tiara awaits.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her eyes on the final challenge, Air Groove
ignites a new fire of motivation in her heart!
